summary: Edge review web extension (Pass C — staged_edges via the web tool, parallel to staged_tags)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Source spec: docs/web-review/edges.md (354 lines, 12 sections). Prerequisite Ticket 0 (rename review_actions.staged_tag_id → target_id) merged 2026-04-26 in commit 99d9ccf — column is now target_id everywhere, polymorphism design is unblocked. Live state: review_actions has 100 rows (98 applied today, 0 queued), edges table has 2627+ rows of which 89 verified / 5 proposed / 0 inferred. The web review tool is operational on phone over tailscale; edge-review extension reuses its infrastructure (snapshot, prepared stmts, apply transaction, parity harness, retry queue, PWA shell). propose_edges runs are populating staged_edges; CLI review_edges.py is the only review path today. 2 PARALLELS edges accepted lifetime — operational gap that motivates this work.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: 8 children with critical path C1 → C2 → C3 → C4 → C5 → C6 → C7 → C8. C1 first (CLI editorial-overlay alignment) decouples from rest. C2 (schema migration) is a single .sql, validates on shadow before live. C3 (CLI helpers + tests) mirrors review_tags.py editorial overlay (todo:f21b6baf). C4-C5 (server) extend apply transaction with target_table dispatch + new /api/edges* routes. C6 (web UI) reuses HeaderBar/StatsDrawer/retry-queue, adds EdgeCard's two-passage layout. C7 (parity) extends seed.sql + fixture decisions to cover the 3 edge action branches. C8 (operator) handles live migration + server restart + phone smoke-test, mirrors the bb25c06b operator handoff pattern: stop server → snapshot → migrate → rebuild → restart. NON-GOALS: auto-promote-edges (deferred to autopromote design.md §10 and edges.md §10). All 8 land on a single umbrella branch todo/659b7664 — single --no-ff merge to main when complete. Live --apply step is operator-driven; agent stops at C7 green and hands off C8.

resolution.note: All 8 children done. C1–C7 landed via PR #1 (todo/659b7664 web extension implementation). C8 (f2d0ff77) closed in commit a0ef03a 'tested and working' — operator live run verified: v3_003 migration applied, server rebuilt + restarted, phone smoke-test confirmed via DB audit (staged_edges.id=3 accepted on live DB at 22:28:17Z).
